import React from 'react' import { Reveal } from './useInView' const stats = [ { value: "98.9%", label: "Client Satisfaction", sub: "+2.3% this year" }, { value: "10,000+", label: "Installations", sub: "+15% year on year" }, { value: "24/7", label: "Support Available", sub: "15 min avg. response" }, { value: "2 Yrs", label: "Industry Experience", sub: "Supported by 11+ years of industry experience" }, ] const delays = ['d-0','d-2','d-3','d-4'] const Analytics = () => (
{stats.map((s, i) => (
{String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}
{s.value}
{s.label}
{s.sub}
 ))}
) export default Analytics
